title: gelsemiaceae
intro: Gelsemiaceae is a family of flowering plants, specifically a monotypic family that consists of a single genus, Gelsemium. This family is native to the Americas and is characterized by its small, white flowers and woody vines. The members of the Gelsemiaceae family are known for their toxic properties and are often used in traditional medicine. The gelsemiaceae family is relatively small, with only a few species found in the wild.
